name: gustwind
description: Gustwind is a Node.js-powered website creator that allows component-oriented development of large-scale sites.

scripts.test: echo "Use npm run quality:gate for the full verification suite or npm run test:e2e for Playwright." && exit 1
scripts.typecheck: deno check --allow-import $(rg --files -g '*.ts' | rg -v '^(e2e/|plugins/.*/compiled-scripts/)') && npm --prefix e2e run typecheck
scripts.quality:gate: deno test --allow-read --allow-write --allow-net --allow-env --allow-run gustwind-node/mod_test.ts gustwind-node/build_test.ts && deno test htmlisp/html-tests htmlisp/html-tests-sync routers/utilities && npm run build:node:check && npm run test:node:dev && npm run test:node:serve && npm run test:e2e

author: Juho Vepsäläinen
